note: Trigger eval set (skill-creator method): realistic queries, including make-from-scratch requests Ripple should route to specialist production tools and near-misses that do not produce or edit a video. IMPORTANT: run from a workspace where every referenced file EXISTS (stub media is fine) - sessions given nonexistent paths spend their turns on file discovery and never reach the decision where a skill triggers. The 2026-07-17 baseline predates Ripple's broader video-making scope and must not be treated as current.
